checks.description: Guardrail: ensure that boundary-value stimulation does not rely on undocumented latency or hidden state.
checks.pass_condition: When edge inputs are applied, the observable output z eventually stabilizes to a defined value without assuming a fixed number of cycles.
checks.trigger_condition: When the linked plan case edge_001 applies boundary-value patterns to inputs a and b.

checks.description: Verify that a legal multiplication operation produces a stable, externally visible result on z after a conservative observation window.
checks.pass_condition: After driving a and b with a legal operand pair, z eventually settles to a value consistent with IEEE‑754 single‑precision multiplication.
checks.trigger_condition: When the linked plan case basic_001 applies a representative legal input pattern to a and b.
